nl_query: Count the number of faculty_course_mapping entries per academic year.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.academic_year, COUNT(*) AS faculty_course_mapping_count
FROM faculty_course_mapping fcm
JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = fcm.course_id
WHERE au.unit_type = 'COURSE' AND fcm.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY au.academic_year
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): academic_unit.academic_year, academic_unit.academic_year. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
